Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 1 25 25}{f 5 13 17 5 114}Your head's actually a mop, huh? It just soaks up everything I tell ya...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel my bond with Mutatsu grow[n]stronger as we spend time together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12288 0 0}{f 5 13 17 5 114}I bet people say you're a pretty weird guy, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel my bond with Mutatsu grow[n]stronger as we spend time together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12292 0 0}{f 5 13 17 5 114}{f 4 23 0 114 1 25 25}Y'know, all you need to get through life is a smile. Why don'tcha try showin' off your pearly whites like me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel my bond with Mutatsu grow[n]stronger as we spend time together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12218 0 0}{f 5 13 17 5 114}They say men're s'posed to be ballsy and women charmin' but it's really the other way around, see.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 1 25 25}Well, if you're plenty attractive, anyone'd open up to ya though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel my bond with Mutatsu grow[n]stronger as we spend time together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship[n]will grow stronger soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
